nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联56种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等56种鸟类。

nodes.name: 新大陆秃鹫科
nodes.summary: 新大陆秃鹫科（Cathartidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如加州神鹫、加州神鷲。

nodes.name: 加州神鷲
nodes.summary: 加州神鷲（California condor，学名 Gymnogyps californianus），分类上属于鷹形目，并归入新大陆秃鹫科，在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁、灌丛、稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、非法猎捕、铅中毒。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: 铅中毒
nodes.summary: 食腐鸟类因摄入铅弹残留而中毒。

nodes.name: 鷹形目
nodes.summary: 鷹形目（Accipitriformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰、加州神鷲。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The California condor lives in rocky shrubland, coniferous forest, and oak savanna. They are often found near cliffs or large trees, which they use as nesting sites

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The California condor lives in rocky shrubland, coniferous forest, and oak savanna. They are often found near cliffs or large trees, which they use as nesting sites

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The California condor lives in rocky shrubland, coniferous forest, and oak savanna. They are often found near cliffs or large trees, which they use as nesting sites

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is one of the world's longest-living birds, with a lifespan of up to 60 years. Condor numbers dramatically declined in the 20th century due to agricultural chemicals (DDT), poaching, lead poisoning, and habitat destruction. A conservation plan put in place by the United States government led to the capture of all the remaining wild condors by 1987, with a total population of 27 individuals.{{cite web | title=Last Wild California Condor Capture for Breeding Program | work=U.S
